text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable! I cast a spell to make things go
smoothly and you still did this terrible?!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Give me a break! There's nothing harder than
being stuck with a terrible familiar.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, don't be like that. You don't need to get
depressed or anything!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I mean, these things happen, right? Don't worry,
I'm not gonna fire you or anything. Keep your
chin up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You know what? I feel like eating something
sweet now. Buy me something and all is forgiven!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: C'mon, let's go to a cafe!
